summary: Full backend + frontend testing of auth fixes, /keys route, profile race condition, and register/login picture field. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend fixes verified. Found and fixed one remaining bug: Profile Quick Actions had hardcoded /api-keys path instead of /keys.

ui_bugs.issue: API Keys quick action button had path: '/api-keys' (broken Kubernetes route). Fixed to '/keys'.

critical_code_review_comments: Profile Quick Actions had '/api-keys' path which conflicts with Kubernetes ingress — fixed to '/keys' in this iteration.
Register flow requires Full Name field (browser-level required validation) — this is correct UX behavior, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Registered fresh test users during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth fixes verified: profile race condition (user===undefined check) working, login/register return picture field, /keys route accessible, sidebar links to /keys. Profile Quick Actions /api-keys bug was found and fixed. Backend key prefix is 'aeg_live_' (not 'rxg_live_').
verified_fixes: PASS: Auth persistence — login → /profile shows profile without redirect
PASS: /keys page loads correctly (empty state shown)
PASS: Create API Key modal opens and form visible
PASS: Landing 'Get Started Free' navigates to /login
PASS: Landing 'For Judges' nav link present
PASS: Register returns picture field (backend verified)
PASS: Login returns picture field (backend verified)
PASS: Profile spinner shown while loading (user===undefined guard)
